# TrustworthyCheck

> Free website safety checker that helps you spot scams, fake stores, and fraudulent websites before they cost you money. Scans any URL for trust signals in under 2 minutes.

TrustworthyCheck analyzes domain age, SSL certificates, business registration, scam reports, and reputation databases to give any website a trust score and clear safety verdict. Built for shoppers, parents, and anyone who wants to verify a site before they click, buy, or share personal info.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Paste any URL and get an instant trust score and safety verdict.
- [Website Checker](/website-checker): Free scanner that checks URLs for scams, phishing, and malware.
- [Threat Feeds](/threats-feed): Live feed of newly reported scam sites and emerging fraud patterns.
- [Recent Reports](/recent-reports): Community-submitted reports of suspicious websites.
- [Save Money](/save-money): Cashback and savings on verified safe stores.
- [Protect Yourself](/protect-yourself): Guides for spotting scams and shopping safely online.
- [About](/about): Our mission to protect people from online fraud.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
